title: Narayana Health is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Narayana Health is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Narayana Health:
Narayana Health is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health!
